name: Australia Post eParcel International Shipping Manual Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": This support article requires the Neto Commerce Ship add-on."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eParcel International services can also use your live rates provided by Australia Post. Follow the steps in "}, {"text": "this article"}, {"text": " to add international shipping using your eParcel account details."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Zones"}], "data-id": "shipping-zones"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zones for eParcel International come pre-installed in Neto. They are under the name "}, {"text": "AP International", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and the rates provided to you will match these zones accordingly."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Prepare your Data"}], "data-id": "preparing-your-data"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eParcel International will provide your rates in a PDF which isn't able to be imported into Neto. Rather than transpose it into a spreadsheet and import, it is quicker to populate the rates through the shipping wizard."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Add the Shipping Option"}], "data-id": "create-the-shipping-method"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "eParcel International shipping is best created through the shipping wizard.:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Add New Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, spreadsheet into the fields provided, depending on which service you're setting up. In this example, we're setting up "}, {"text": "Airmail", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup5.05T5g00000xrb5qEAA.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup5.05T5g00000xrb5qEAA.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image5", "width": 700, "height": 414}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "eParcel International has weight limits on its services. With Airmail, there's two bands of rates, for packages under 2kg, and packages over 2kg up to 20kg. Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and check the "}, {"text": "Set Different Pricing For Certain Shipping Locations", "bold": true}, {"text": " box and check all locations you have pricing information for ."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup6.05T5g00000xrdFYEAY.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup6.05T5g00000xrdFYEAY.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image6", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the pricing information provided by Australia Post into the fields, adding a new band for the 2kg to 20kg rates. The "}, {"text": "Per Item Plus", "bold": true}, {"text": " charge needs to go into the "}, {"text": "1st Parcel Override", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Per Subsequent Parcel Override", "bold": true}, {"text": ". Enter the "}, {"text": "Per KG", "bold": true}, {"text": " rate into the "}, {"text": "Per Kg Override", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": At this stage it is highly recommended that you test the shipping option to ensure accurate costs are returned."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup12.05T5g00000xrfJ2EAI.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/AustraliaPosteParcelInternationalShippingManualSetup12.05T5g00000xrfJ2EAI.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image12", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Complete the "}, {"type": "a", "url": "http://forms.neto.com.au/services/shippingcarrierlabelsetup.html", "children": [{"text": "Shipping Carrier Label Setup"}]}, {"text": " form and Neto staff will configure your labels as a free service."}]}]}]}]
